description_long: This fishing rod features a slender, telescopic design with a predominantly purple shaft and black handle. The rod is equipped with a cylindrical reel attached to the side, which appears metallic and includes a visible handle for winding. Four evenly spaced line guides are mounted along the length of the rod, each appearing as small metallic rings. The handle is thick, black, and likely made of foam or rubber for a comfortable grip, contrasting with the glossy finish of the rod itself. The reel seat is visible and metallic, securely holding the reel in place. No brand logos or markings are visible on the rod, and the tip tapers to a fine point, suggesting moderate flexibility suitable for general fishing.
description: A purple telescopic fishing rod with a black ergonomic handle, metallic reel, and four line guides. The rod has a sleek, modern appearance with no visible branding.
description_view_0: The fishing rod is shown with the reel and handle clearly visible on the right side, highlighting the cylindrical reel and the first line guide.
description_view_1: This view displays the reel from a different angle, showing the reel handle and the metallic reel seat attachment more prominently.
description_view_2: The rod is seen from the opposite side, with the reel now on the left, and the line guides aligned along the shaft.
description_view_3: The fishing rod is shown from the back, with the reel handle and seat visible on the left, and the rod's tapering tip in clear view.
attribute_reel_attachment: A metallic reel seat is present, securely holding a cylindrical reel with a visible winding handle. The reel seat appears to be made of metal and is integrated into the rod's lower section.
attribute_line_guides: Four metallic line guides are visible, evenly spaced along the rod. They are silver in color, single-footed, and appear to be made of metal with a simple, functional design.
attribute_handle_type: The handle is a full grip type, thick and cylindrical, made of black foam or rubber for ergonomic comfort and a secure hold.
attribute_brand_logo: No brand logo or marking is visible on the fishing rod.
attribute_tip_flexibility: The rod tip appears to be moderately thin and tapered, suggesting a 'medium' flexibility suitable for general fishing applications.
